jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Mphasis
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Mphasis in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mphasis:
Mphasis is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mphasis!
